mapper.select: SELECT id, name, phone, address, description FROM merchant WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, phone, address, description FROM merchant
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant (name, phone, address, description) VALUES (#{name}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
